observations.description: Approximately 9-10 young children are visible, standing in a line, mostly facing away from the camera. They are performing arm movements, bending forward, and moving their hands as if mimicking a doll's actions. Some children are looking back at the camera or around. Backpacks and water bottles are on the floor in front of them. A chart with colored circles and text is visible on the wall.

The children continue the arm movements and bending. Their movements are synchronized with the teacher's singing. A girl in a light blue dress and a girl in a yellow top with stripes are particularly animated. The child closest to the camera in a striped shirt is also following the movements.

The children maintain their positions and continue the coordinated movements, bending at the waist and moving their arms. The teacher's voice is heard giving instructions and leading the song. The children appear engaged in the activity.
